html: <div class='h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-900 gap-8'>
script: var opacity = interpolate(frame, { input: { inMin: 0, inMax: fps }, output: { outMin: 0, outMax: 1 } });
var scale = interpolate(frame, { input: { inMin: 0, inMax: fps }, output: { outMin: 0.5, outMax: 1 }, easing: 'easeOut' });
var rotation = interpolate(frame, { input: { inMin: 0, inMax: totalFrames }, output: { outMin: 0, outMax: 360 } });

html: <div class='h-full flex flex-col items-center justify-center bg-slate-900 gap-8'>
script: animation.animate('#box', { opacity: [0, 1], scale: [0.5, 1] }, { start: 0, end: 1, easing: 'easeOut' });
function render(frame, totalFrames, fps) { animation.update(frame, fps); }
